title: cypholophus treubii
intro: Cypholophus treubii, also known as the Java tea tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, native to the tropical forests of Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cypholophus treubii include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
